immediate_actions: Block the source IP at the perimeter.
Force password reset for the targeted account.
investigation_steps: Audit failed login attempts and source behavior.
Confirm whether additional accounts were targeted.
response_results.long_term_fix: Enable account lockout thresholds and monitor repeated login failures.

immediate_actions: Review the account's recent privilege changes.
Revoke unnecessary elevated rights immediately.
investigation_steps: Confirm whether the privilege escalation was authorized.
Inspect access logs for unusual user activity.
response_results.long_term_fix: Implement least privilege, role reviews, and just-in-time access.
